scripts.dev:api: uv run --project apps/api flask --app levels_api:create_app run --port 8000 --debug
scripts.openapi:check: npm run openapi:lint && npm --workspace @levels/api-client run check:generated
scripts.lint: npm run lint:web && npm run lint:api && npm run lint:e2e
scripts.lint:api: uv run --project apps/api ruff check apps/api/src apps/api/tests && uv run --project apps/api ruff format --check apps/api/src apps/api/tests
scripts.lint:e2e: uv run --project apps/api ruff check e2e/start_api.py && uv run --project apps/api ruff format --check e2e/start_api.py
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:web && npm run typecheck:client && npm run typecheck:api
scripts.typecheck:e2e: tsc --project e2e/tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false && uv run --project apps/api mypy apps/api/src e2e/start_api.py
scripts.test: npm run test:web && npm run test:client && npm run test:api
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run typecheck:e2e && npm run test && npm run openapi:check && npm run build && npm run e2e
